description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a clean, rectangular layout and a spacious open-plan interior. The front includes a driveway leading to a garage, while the rear showcases a large swimming pool bordered by a wooden deck and several trees for privacy. The exterior walls are primarily white with some sections of natural wood or stone cladding, and the property is enclosed by a wooden fence. Large glass windows and sliding doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor living spaces to the outdoor pool area. The landscaping is minimal, with a narrow strip of grass running along one side and a cluster of trees at the back. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a rear swimming pool, and minimalist landscaping. The design features clean lines, white walls, and a blend of wood and glass elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, flat roof, and the pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the swimming pool, wooden deck, and trees providing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side windows, and the pool area extending to the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass panels and sliding doors
